    "text": "func NewRepository(r db.Reader, w db.Writer, kms *kms.Kms, ctx context.Context, opt ...Option) (*Repository, error) {\nn1: \tconst op = \"password.NewRepository\"\nn2: \tswitch {\nn3: \tcase r == nil:\nn4: \t\treturn nil, errors.NewDeprecated(errors.InvalidParameter, op, \"missing db.Reader\")\nn5: \tcase w == nil:\nn6: \t\treturn nil, errors.NewDeprecated(errors.InvalidParameter, op, \"missing db.Writer\")\nn7: \tcase kms == nil:\nn8: \t\treturn nil, errors.NewDeprecated(errors.InvalidParameter, op, \"missing kms\")\n\t}\n\nn9: \topts := getOpts(opt...)\nn10: \tif opts.withLimit == 0 {\n\t\t// zero signals the boundary defaults should be used.\nn11: \t\topts.withLimit = db.DefaultLimit\n\t}\n\nn12: \treturn \u0026Repository{\n\t\treader:       r,\n\t\twriter:       w,\n\t\tkms:          kms,\n\t\tdefaultLimit: opts.withLimit,\n\t}, nil\n}\n"
  }
